---
title: "Botany ENM Workshops 2026"
author: "Soltis Lab"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
output:
  bookdown::gitbook:
    css: style.css

---

# Welcome {-}

This book accompanies the **Botany ENM Workshop 2026**.

The chapters below are generated automatically from the workshop R scripts.

The code examples shown throughout the book are taken directly from the workshop scripts and are intended to be copied and run by participants.

## Contributors   
This document was developed by Pamela S. Soltis, Douglas E. Soltis, [Shelly Gaynor](https://github.com/mgaynor1), [Makenzie Mabry](https://makenziemabry.weebly.com/), [Elizabeth White](https://github.com/ewhite344), [JT Miller](https://github.com/jtmiller28), Sarah Ellen Strickland, and Cameron J. McMullen.  


Many people contributed to this material including:         
  - [Anthony Melton](https://github.com/meltonae)    
  - [Johanna Jantzen](https://github.com/jjantzen)    
  - [Andre Naranjo](https://github.com/aanaranjo)    
  - Maria Cortez     
  - Malu Ore Rengifo    
  - [Lauren Gillett](https://github.com/laurenwhitehurst21)    
  - Sebastian Fernandez    
  - Sydney Barfus     
  - Tyler Radtke
